MINI MINUTES: Notice having been given and there being no appearance nor an objection filed, the Court orders case dismissed pursuant to California Rules of Court Section 3.1385. JUDGE CYNTHIA M. LEE; Clerk KCox; Proceedings not reported. (610) After-hearing, dismissal filed.

Haohao Song, Esq. of Klein Law Group (408-508-9138) for K & K Plumbing & Fire Protection, Guan Zhang, Defendants and moving party

Hearing is held. The Court having reviewed the pleadings and having heard oral argument rules as follows: DEFENDANTs K & K PLUMBING & FIRE PROTECTION, INC., GUAN ZHANG's Motion To Quash Or Modify Or Limit Subpoena is Granted.
